description:
**Bug:** The archive-on-completion feature (archival-service.ts) creates stub feature.json files in the original feature directory after moving the full data to `.automaker/archive/`. These stubs only contain `{ id, archived, archivedAt, archivePath }` — they lack `status: "done"` and `title`.

**Impact:** The Lead Engineer state machine picks up these stubs as real features, fails the "goal gate" check (no title/description), escalates them, and fires escalation notifications. This creates false alarms that make the system look broken.

**Fix:**
1. In `archival-service.ts`, ensure stubs always include `status: "done"` and `title: "<original title>"` 
2. In FeatureLoader, add a guard: if `archived: true`, always treat as `status: "done"` regardless of what's in the file
3. In the LE state machine intake, skip features with `archived: true`

**Files to Modify:**
- apps/server/src/services/archival-service.ts
- apps/server/src/services/feature-loader.ts (guard)

**Priority:** P1 — causes false escalation storms on every archive-on-completion cycle
title: Fix archival stubs to include status:done and title
